data.description: Putin's meeting with the American delegation has been going on in the Kremlin for over three hours.

data.title: US rule change accelerates seafloor mining. The Metals Co. doubles mining area in application.
data.description: A leading seabed-mining company, The Metals Company, welcomed the recent development and submitted a revised application, increasing the mining area by more than 100%.

data.title: Lomiko Metals Inc (TSX-V: LMR) grants RSUs and DSUs to board and management as part of incentive program. Stock options cancelled.
data.description: Montreal-based company Lomiko Metals Inc. (TSX-V: LMR) has disclosed the allocation of grants for management and board members' compensation. The Board has approved the issuance of Restricted Share Units (RSUs) for management, as well as RSUs and Deferred Share Units (DSUs) for the Board. Additionally, stock options will be provided to management under the Company's 2025 Omnibus Equity Incentive Plan. These incentives form part of the annual short and long-term incentive program established by the Board. The announcement does not specify the exact number of RSUs, DSUs, or stock options granted.
JAPAN DEC. CORE CPI RISES 2.4% Y/Y; EST. +2.4%

data.title: HII marks one year of operations at NNS Charleston in Goose Creek with community leaders, Navy, and shipbuilders.
data.description: In Goose Creek, South Carolina, on January 22, 2026, HII (NYSE: HII) celebrated the first anniversary of Newport News Shipbuilding (NNS) Charleston Operations. The event included gatherings with community members and Navy officials at the facility, as well as a town hall meeting for all shipbuilders at NNS Charleston Operations.

data.title: Gonzaga University reveals tender results and pricing, following an Invitation to Tender dated January 5, 2026.
data.description: Spokane, Washington - On January 22, 2026, the Corporation of Gonzaga University released details regarding the tender results and pricing information. This announcement follows the Invitation to Tender issued on January 5, 2026. Gonzaga University provided the latest updates on the process, without specifying the exact numbers.

data.title: Petco priced $600,000,000 senior secured notes for issuance and sale, due on Feb 1, 2031.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Petco (Nasdaq: WOOF) disclosed the pricing details of its senior secured notes offering, confirming the sale of $600,000,000 in aggregate principal amount of new senior secured notes. The notes are set to mature on February 1, 2031.

data.title: FlyersRights and experts demand changes to Boeing 787-9 after crash killing 260 people.
data.description: In response to the tragic Boeing 787-9 crash from last summer that resulted in the loss of 260 lives, the country's primary airline passenger association is calling for urgent examinations and repairs to address a critical design flaw in the widely-used commercial aircraft.

data.title: First Industrial Realty Trust closes $425M and $375M unsecured term loans for refinancing, Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: In Chicago on January 22, 2026, First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FR), a prominent owner, operator, and developer of logistics real estate, revealed the successful refinancing of its $425 million unsecured term loan. The loan, which had an initial maturity date set for January 22, has been successfully renegotiated by the company.

data.title: SAGA Metals accelerates warrant expiry, with over $675,000 exercised since January 1, 2026.
data.description: SAGA Metals has declared the acceleration of warrant expiry, revealing that more than $675,000 worth of warrant money has been exercised and received by the company starting from January 1, 2026.

data.title: Astera Labs updates Scorpio X-Series Smart Fabric Switch roadmap for $20 billion merchant switching market.
data.description: Astera Labs has enhanced its Scorpio X-Series Smart Fabric Switch roadmap by introducing new features, targeting the $20 billion Merchant Scale-Up Switching Market.

data.title: Trump might start flying on a jet given by Qatar by summer. It's uncertain if it'll receive Air Force One security updates, which could take 2 years.
data.description: It is currently uncertain if the aircraft will receive all the security upgrades needed for it to become Air Force One. Industry experts estimate that these upgrades could take up to two years to be fully implemented.

data.title: Rocket Lab is pushing the boundaries with its Neutron rocket, willing to break tanks to break records. RKLB stock is down.
data.description: In the competitive aerospace sector, the fine line between a triumphant launch and a disastrous setback hinges on meticulously monitored pressure levels. Rocket Lab's recent report regarding their medium-lift Neutron rocket underscores this critical factor: to achieve groundbreaking achievements, the company must push the boundaries during the development phase. Following recent developments, RKLB stock has experienced a decline. For detailed information on the scheduled test's outcome on Tuesday evening, where Neutron's Stage 1 tank encountered challenges, please refer to the comprehensive coverage on Benzinga.com.

data.title: PG&E offering college scholarships up to $10,000 for STEM students, total of $650,000 in scholarships this year. Apply now!
data.description: PG&E's Employee Resource and Engineering Groups are providing college scholarships totaling around $650,000 this year. The PG&E Corporation Foundation is currently accepting applications for their annual Better Together STEM Scholarship program in Oakland, California. This scholarship opportunity is aimed at students pursuing studies in STEM fields.

data.title: Zynex responds to indictment of former executives; specializes in medical devices for pain management; issued statement on Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: Englewood, Colorado - As of January 22, 2026, Zynex, Inc. (ZYXIQ) made an announcement about their focus on creating and selling non-invasive medical tools for pain relief and recovery. The company is known for its innovative medical technology products.

data.title: Forge Global shareholders approve merger with Schwab. 9,687,311 shares voted.
data.description: Forge Global Holdings, Inc. ("Forge") disclosed today in San Francisco that its stockholders have given their endorsement to all resolutions concerning the upcoming acquisition of Forge by The Charles Schwab Corporation ("Schwab"). The approved acquisition involves a total of 9,687,311 shares of Forge's common stock, either presented in person or by proxy at Forge's special stockholder meeting. Forge is recognized as a major provider of marketplace infrastructure, data services, and technology and investment solutions for the private market. The acquiring company, Schwab, is a well-known financial services firm.

data.title: Coinbase forms advisory board to analyze quantum computing's impact on Bitcoin security and propose solutions.
data.description: The company Coinbase announced the formation of a team that will examine the potential impact of upcoming quantum advancements on blockchain security. This team will focus on developing sustainable solutions for the long-term security of the blockchain technology.
